posts.author: andyoungy (Andy Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Has anyone used a board on Monday to plan a migration, specifically from network drives to One Drive but could be anything similar? I am looking for a template that is proven to have helped someone already so any help would be great.

Thanks
